name: valueHandle::GetChangeCount
title: valueHandle::GetChangeCount
description: Returns the change count of the value. The change count is reset to zero at start of measurement and with each call to valueHandle::ResetValueState. It is then increased each time the value changes (but not if it is updated with the same value).

For some values, the count is only initialized when the value is accessed the first time for performance reasons. This means that if you want to use it as a ‘global’ count over the whole measurement, you should call valueHandle::ResetValueState at the start of the measurement explicitly.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
